description: TreeKanban - Everything that feeds the SQLite kanban board (Canopy schedule + GIINT planning + OPERA vendor)

treekanban.description: TreeKanban - Canopy schedule, GIINT planning, OPERA vendor all feed SQLite board

tk_next_task.description: Get highest-priority card from the build lane.

tk_view_board.description: View all cards across all lanes on the TreeKanban board.
tk_view_board.signature: tk_view_board(board: str = 'heaven_base_xfer', show_details: bool = false) -> str

tk_view_lane.description: View cards in a specific lane (plan, build, done, backlog).

tk_view_card.description: View a single card's full details by ID.

tk_create_card.description: Create a card. Requires starsystem tag and assignee (ai-human/ai-only/human-only for canopy routing). Cards flow: plan→build→measure→learn→done. ai-only cards auto-route to agent.
tk_create_card.signature: tk_create_card(title: str, starsystem: str, assignee: str, description: str = '', lane: str = 'backlog', tags: str = '[]') -> str

tk_get_family.description: Get family tree for a card (parent, children, siblings).

tk_move_above.description: Move a card above a target card (preserves family structure).
tk_move_above.signature: tk_move_above(board: str = 'heaven_base_xfer', card_id: int = 0, target_id: int = 0) -> str

tk_move_below.description: Move a card below a target card (preserves family structure).
tk_move_below.signature: tk_move_below(board: str = 'heaven_base_xfer', card_id: int = 0, target_id: int = 0) -> str

tk_add_tag.description: Add a tag to a card.
tk_add_tag.signature: tk_add_tag(board: str = 'heaven_base_xfer', card_id: int = 0, tag: str = '') -> str

tk_remove_tag.description: Remove a tag from a card.
tk_remove_tag.signature: tk_remove_tag(board: str = 'heaven_base_xfer', card_id: int = 0, tag: str = '') -> str

tk_move_to_lane.description: Move a card to a different PBML lane. Valid lanes: backlog, plan, build, measure, learn, done, blocked, archive.
tk_move_to_lane.signature: tk_move_to_lane(card_id: int, lane: str, board: str = 'heaven_base_xfer') -> str

tk_schedule.description: Canopy master schedule - user-facing interface to TreeKanban. Items sync to SQLite board via omnisanc hooks.

tk_add_item.description: Add work item to master schedule. Types: AI+Human, AI-Only, Human-Only. Execution: mission or plotted_course.
tk_add_item.signature: tk_add_item(item_type: str, description: str, execution_type: str, execution_type_decision_explanation: str, priority: int = 5) -> str

tk_next_item.description: Get next pending item from schedule. Optionally filter by type (AI+Human, AI-Only, Human-Only).

tk_view.description: View master schedule with optional status filter (pending, in_progress, completed).

tk_complete.description: Mark schedule item as completed. Triggers OPERA pattern detection via omnisanc hook.

tk_item_status.description: Update schedule item status (pending, in_progress, completed).

tk_planning.description: GIINT planning tools that auto-sync to TreeKanban SQLite board via omnisanc hooks.

tk_add_deliverable.description: Add deliverable to GIINT component. Omnisanc hook auto-creates card on TreeKanban SQLite board.
tk_add_deliverable.signature: tk_add_deliverable(project_id: str, feature_name: str, component_name: str, deliverable_name: str) -> str

tk_add_task.description: Add task to GIINT deliverable. Assignee: AI+Human (risky/complex), AI-Only (safe/reviewable), Human-Only (human thing). Omnisanc hook auto-creates card on TK board.
tk_add_task.signature: tk_add_task(project_id: str, feature_name: str, component_name: str, deliverable_name: str, task_id: str, assignee: str, agent_id: str = 'gnosys', human_name: str = '') -> str

tk_update_task.description: Update GIINT task status. Syncs to TreeKanban SQLite board (blocked/measure/learn lanes).
tk_update_task.signature: tk_update_task(project_id: str, feature_name: str, component_name: str, deliverable_name: str, task_id: str, is_done: bool, is_blocked: bool, blocked_description: str, is_ready: bool) -> str

tk_vendor.description: Vendor an OPERA operadic flow. Omnisanc hook auto-creates pattern card on TreeKanban SQLite board.
